behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names files (src/infra/exec-inline-eval.ts, src/infra/exec-approvals-allowlist.ts), functions (detectInterpreterInlineEvalArgv, isInterpreterLikeAllowlistPattern, describeInterpreterInlineEval), schema keys (executable, normalizedExecutable, flag, argv), and literal strings ('<program>', 'awk inline program').

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior and edge cases but does not prescribe specific line edits or code; the agent still must reason about implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check observable behavior (return values, description strings, import presence) rather than gold-specific internal helpers or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke TypeScript functions via tsx subprocess and check returned values; only one test (test_allowlist_imports_interpreter_check) does text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning null/false would fail tests like test_detect_awk_inline_positional (requires hit.flag == '<program>') and test_allowlist_recognizes_awk (requires True).

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover inline detection, value flag skipping, double-dash, file flag exclusion, variant description, allowlist recognition, and integration wiring as specified.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with section comments separating fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, and agent-config rule checks.

structured_data_schema.reason: The hit dict schema (executable, normalizedExecutable, flag, argv) is documented in the Return Value Schema section.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and function names are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files/functions needing changes, which is appropriate given localization is not part of the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
